notes: Core contribution is the AIDev dataset built by mining 456K+ agent-authored GitHub PRs (MSR/repository-mining); it then runs three quantitative measurement analyses (acceptance rates, review turnaround, cyclomatic complexity) framed by the authors as 'case studies' though they are large-scale observational, not in-depth single-context. Also includes a substantial conceptual roadmap (SE 1.0-3.0 framing, nine research directions, SE 3.0 vision). No human participants; humans appear only as a PR baseline.
